zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Bourbon於大約1308年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達普易利--奧瓦斯時，她的父親Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame30歲，母親Marie de Hainaut30歲。她於1320年7月22日與Jean I de SULLY在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特素利-素-洛易結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1370年2月28日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯坎塔爾沙吉皮享年63歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Bourbon于大约1308年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達普易利--奧瓦斯时，她的父亲Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame30岁，母亲Marie de Hainaut30岁。她于1320年7月22日与Jean I de SULLY在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特素利-素-洛易结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1370年2月28日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯坎塔爾沙吉皮享年63岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Bourbon was born about 1308, in Pouilly-en-Auxois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, was 30 and her mother, Marie de Hainaut, was 30. She married Jean I de SULLY on 22 July 1320, in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 28 February 1370, in Saint-Pierre, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Bourbon est née environ 1308, à Pouilly-en-Auxois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marie de Hainaut, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Jean I de SULLY le 22 juillet 1320, à Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1370, à Saint-Pierre, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Bourbon um 1308 in Pouilly-en-Auxois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame 30 und ihre Mutter Marie de Hainaut 30. Sie hat am 22. Juli 1320 in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich Jean I de SULLY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Februar 1370 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Saint-Pierre, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bourbon è nata il circa 1308 nel Pouilly-en-Auxois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Marie de Hainaut, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Jean I de SULLY il 22 luglio 1320, nel Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1370, nel Saint-Pierre, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Francia.

ko.Sully-sur-Loire,45315,Loiret,Centre-Val: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르
프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bourbon(이)가 대략 1308년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 파우이리--오스이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Hainaut(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1320년 7월 22일 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르에서 Jean I de SULLY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 2월 28일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 캔탤 세인트-피르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Jean I de SULLY em 22 de julho de 1320, em Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.Sully-sur-Loire,45315,Loiret,Centre-Val: сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Bourbon родилась около 1308 г. в местности поуилли-ен-ауксоис, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Hainaut, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean I de SULLY 22 июля 1320 г. в местности сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 февраля 1370 г. в местности сеинт-пьирр, канталь, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Bourbon nació aproximadamente 1308, en Pouilly-en-Auxois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marie de Hainaut, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Jean I de SULLY el 22 de julio de 1320, en Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1370, en Saint-Pierre, Cantal, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Francia.
